calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for Award of Attorney's Fees Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
After hearing the argument by counsel, considering of Memorandum of Points and Authorities filed in support, and the filed declaration of Stephen M. Kappos, the Court granted the Motion and awarded Attorney's Fees of $2,550.00
Counsel to prepare Order and submit to Dept. 218 on or before June 25, 2009 for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert Resner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Grest Western Collection Bureau, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants CRM Management, Inc., a California Corporation or Chakay McDonald, a/k/a Chakay Rochelle McDonald, a/k/a Chakay R. McDonald, a/k/a Barton Chakay McDonald, individually and guarantor of CRM Management, Inc.
Default was entered against defendants on January 5, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 5, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendants CRM Management, Inc., a California Corporation , Chakay McDonald, a/k/a Chakay Rochelle McDonald, a/k/a Chakay R. McDonald, a/k/a Barton Chakay McDonald, individually as guarantor of CRM Management, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,018.37.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,875.68.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $505.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $27,399.25.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Continued To May-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
